description: React controlled <input value={state}> fights Playwright's fill() — the value gets reverted between keystrokes and assertions flake.
resolution: Use defaultValue for initial form values and let the browser own the input state. Reach for controlled inputs only when you actually need to react to typing in real time.

content: PROMPTIONARY_MOCK_GEMINI=1 is read by lib/gemini.ts at module load — it's a SERVER-side flag, not a test-runner flag. To run mock-Gemini e2e against a Vercel Preview deploy, the env var must be set in Vercel's Preview environment (already configured). Setting it only locally on the Playwright runner does NOT make the deployed server stub Gemini. The Playwright runner does still need it set so that the test.skip(!process.env.PROMPTIONARY_MOCK_GEMINI) gating in full-round-mocked.spec.ts / taboo.spec.ts / vote-to-skip.spec.ts allows the spec to actually run.
